overall.description: Game footage showing a first-person view through a telescope interface solving an astronomical constellation puzzle. The player aligns scattered stars to match the Draco constellation pattern, culminating in the UI fading and the constellation name appearing upon completion.

scene_state.functional_zone: telescope observatory interface for constellation alignment puzzle

events.description: final star snapped into position completing the constellation alignment

agents.ego_description: manipulating telescope controls to align scattered stars into the Draco constellation pattern

entered.detail: circular metallic frame of the telescope viewport with detailed edge textures
blue glowing lines forming the guide pattern for the Draco constellation
dense field of background stars against dark blue night sky

segments.scene_description: View through a telescope showing a star field with a constellation pattern. The player manipulates the view to align stars with the blue guide lines of the Draco constellation. The circular metal rim of the telescope frames the view, with a control UI visible at the bottom.

scene_state.functional_zone: completed constellation display with identification label

events.description: puzzle interface fades out and constellation name DRACO appears at bottom of view

agents.ego_description: viewing the completed constellation as the interface fades and identification text appears

entered.detail: white text label DRACO appearing below the completed constellation pattern

segments.scene_description: The constellation puzzle completes as the UI fades away. The name DRACO appears below the fully aligned star pattern, confirming the successful completion of the astronomical puzzle. The view stabilizes on the finished constellation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous view through a telescope interface that transforms from an active astronomical puzzle into a completed celestial map. It begins with a star field framed by a circular metal rim, where the camera shifts to align scattered stars with the blue guide lines of the Draco constellation. As the final stars snap into place, the control UI at the bottom of the frame gradually fades away to clear the view. The scene then stabilizes on the fully aligned pattern before the name DRACO appears below the stars to confirm the puzzle's completion.
